View all
Sorry! nothing found for
I have recently relocated to India and would like to update my resident status from Non-Resident Indian (NRI) to Resident Indian (RI). Could you please assist me with this change?
Modified on Fri, 6 Mar at 10:05 AM
Any resident status change process involves four steps.
1. KYC Modification
2. Creation of a new account
3. Updating the new TAX status in the existing folios
4. Movement of Folios to the new account
For updating the KYC (7-10 working days) (Scanned and Physical Copies):
Self-signed PAN
Self-signed Aadhar card
KYC form: Kindly affix your passport-size photo, sign across the same and also sign on the first and second page in the given slot (Applicant E sign and Applicant Wet signature). The details that are required to be filled in are contact number, email ID, and PAN details. Please do not fill in any other details, we will do what is needed according to the documents you will share with us. Attached is the KYC form)
Note:
The KYC modification process is offline and we would need the above-mentioned physical documents to be attested by a scheduled Indian bank (in India or overseas) or from a Notary Public or by any Gazette Government Official and then couriered to our office address.
We request you share the coloured scanned copies of the documents for the KYC change via email for pre-verification. Post confirmation that documents are good to proceed, they are required to be couriered to our office address.
Creation of New Account (within 2 hours from the time of completion of sign-up):
Once the KYC is registered as an RI, request you to create a new Scripbox account by adding yourself as a family member in your Scripbox account, entering the new Savings bank account details & with the Resident status as RI.
Steps to add yourself as a family member
Once the account is active, we recommend you not start the investments in your new NRI account until the entire process is completed. This is to avoid any investments being rejected due to Multiple Tax Status at the folios.
For updating the folios with the new Tax status (10 working days) (
Scanned and Physical Copies
):
New bank proof:
Cancelled cheque with name printed for Savings bank account or Latest bank statement with the recent three months transactions sheet along with banker's attestation by Bank Manager or above (round seal, signature, designation, name, and employee code)
Old Bank Proof:
Cancelled cheque with name printed for NRO/NRE bank account (details as per registered bank account with Scripbox)
or Latest bank statement with the r
ecent three months transactions sheet
along with banker's attestation
by Bank Manager or above
(round seal, signature, designation, name, and employee code)
Signed Resident change form (form will be shared later once the KYC is approved as RI and RI account is active)
Movement of folios (1 working day):
Once the tax status is updated in the folios, we will move the folios from the Non-Resident Indian account to the new Resident Indian account.
If we need any additional documents, we shall let you know accordingly. The change of resident status usually takes 4 weeks from the time we have received the complete set of documents.
Office address:
Scripbox Wealth Managers Pvt Ltd, Wilshire III by MFAR, 5th Floor, 492, Hobli, RHB Colony, Mahadevapura, Bengaluru, Karnataka- 560048
Attachments (1)
pdf
KYC Form - Individual.pdf
352 KB

Sorry! nothing found for
How do I set Notification preferences?
Modified on Mon, 21 Oct, 2024 at  9:23 AM
You can set your notification preferences on Scripbox by following the below steps:
1. Log in to your Scripbox account
2. Click on Profile tab > Notifications Preferences under profile settings
3. You can set the preferences for email / push / Whatsapp / SMS notifications
You can opt out from most of the communication we send, except transactional, if you wish – although this may lead to a sub-par experience for you. However, we are very mindful of the communication we send and ensure that we never spam our customers.
We do not share your email and phone number with any third-party sales companies. However, in order to enable you to invest, we do share your communication information with the mutual fund companies and SEBI-regulated KYC registration agencies (e.g. CAMS, Karvy, CDSL, NSDL). Please note the frequency and content of these messages is not within Scripbox’s control and you cannot unsubscribe from these.

The Address change process involves four steps:
1. Raise the request for an address change from your Scripbox account
2. KYC Modification
3. Updating the new address in the existing folios
4. Updating the new address in the Scripbox records
Steps to raise the address change request via the app:
a. Login into your Scripbox account
b. Click on Profile (towards the right-hand side corner on the top of the home page)
c. Click on the investor name - Under Investments - Click on Scripbox - Click on Address - Click on Change.
d. Edit the address and Click on Update Changes
For updating the new address in KYC (7-10 working days) (Scanned and Physical Copies):
Self-signed PAN (notary/attestation required)
Self-signed Aadhar card  (notary/attestation required)
KYC form: Kindly affix your passport-size photo, sign across the same and also sign on the first and second page in the given slot (Applicant E sign and Applicant Wet signature). The details that are required to be filled in are contact number, email ID, and PAN details. Please do not fill in any other details, we will do what is needed according to the documents you will share with us. Attached is the KYC form).
Note:
The address change process is offline and we would need the physical documents to be attested by a scheduled Indian bank in India or from a Notary Public or by any Gazette Government Official and then couriered to our office address.
We request you share the coloured scanned copies of the above documents for the address change via email for pre-verification. Post confirmation tha documents are good to proceed, they are required to be couriered to our office address.
Office address:
Scripbox Wealth Managers Pvt Ltd, Wilshire III by MFAR, 5th Floor, 492, Hobli, RHB Colony, Mahadevapura, Bengaluru, Karnataka- 560048
3
.
For updating the new address at the folios (10 working days):
Once the new address is updated in the KYC. It usually takes 7-10 working days to update the new address in the folios.
4.
For updating the new address in your Scripbox account (1 working day):
Once the new address is updated in the KYC as well as at the folios, the new address will be updated in the Scripbox records.
If we need any additional documents, we shall let you know accordingly. The change of address change usually takes 4 weeks from the time we have received the complete set of documents.
